contract_claim: `total_candidates` is computed as `len(decided) + len(mechanical_keys)` (L702). `mechanical` findings are already included in `decided` (L637: `return mechanical + decided`), so mechanical findings are double-counted: they appear in `decided` AND their count is added via `len(mechanical_keys)`. This inflates the reported total.
observed_behavior: `total_candidates` is computed as `len(decided) + len(mechanical_keys)` (L702). `mechanical` findings are already included in `decided` (L637: `return mechanical + decided`), so mechanical findings are double-counted: they appear in `decided` AND their count is added via `len(mechanical_keys)`. This inflates the reported total.
